case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. DEVON CAO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $459.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CAO, DEVON
